labels.name: getPersonProfile
labels.description: Get person profile - Get basic profile information for a person

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: getSharePosts · Public sink: createSharePost, getSharePosts.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: getSharePosts · Public sink: createSharePost, getSharePosts

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
